svg.text: contracts + the future, then the pool
PART 1 contract — run off the caller's thread
so the caller never blocks on submit()
worker counts the latch down exactly once
PART 2 — SCHEDULING EXTENSION : schedule → DelayQueue → scheduler → dispatch
runOnce() ← runs on a WORKER thread
cancel(): periodic anytime; one-shot if PENDING
get() blocks on its own latch (one-shot only)
the class the interviewer reads first
scheduler DECIDES WHEN · pool DOES THE WORK ✓
take() blocks until earliest is DUE
O(log n) insert / poll · NO polling loop
a slow task body can't delay the next fire ✓
build Part 1, then inherit + add scheduling

① TaskHandle future + TaskProcessor contract → ② WorkerPool: BlockingQueue + workers + POISON → ③ ScheduledTaskEntry (Delayed) + ScheduledTaskProcessor → ④ AsyncTaskProcessor EXTENDS pool + DelayQueue scheduler

g.text: Async Task Processor (+ scheduling) — machine-coding LLD
